task: Can you help me sketch out a simple plan for this week? A couple of things on my schedule have already changed, and I want a way to keep track of what still needs to happen. Please keep it easy to follow for a school week.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple, easy-to-follow school-week plan you can use when a few things have already changed.

## Simple Weekly Plan
Use this as a checklist each day:

### Monday
- After school: check your assignments and calendar
- Do the most urgent homework first
- Take a short break
- Finish any smaller task if time
- Pack your bag for the next day

### Tuesday
- After school: start with the assignment that is due soonest
- Work for one focused block of time
- If you have practice, get ready and go
- After practice: finish any quick homework
- Pack your bag before bed

### Wednesday
- After school: review what is still unfinished
- Do the hardest assignment first
- Take a break
- Finish one smaller task
- Pack your bag

### Thursday
- After school: check for any updated changes
- Work on the next assignment that still needs attention
- If you have practice, do homework before or after depending on time
- Pack everything you need for Friday

### Friday
- After school: finish anything still left
- Put away school papers and organize your bag
- Look ahead to next week
- Relax once everything is done

## Easy “What Still Needs to Happen” Tracker
You can keep a short list like this:

- [ ] Assignment 1
- [ ] Assignment 2
- [ ] Practice
- [ ] Pack bag
- [ ] Turn in work
- [ ] Check for schedule changes

## Quick Rule for the Week
If plans change, just ask:
1. What is due next?
2. What can I do today?
3. What needs to be moved?

If you want, I can turn this into a **day-by-day plan with times** for your actual schedule.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, this is good, but it’s still kind of generic. I want it a little more like a real school week I can actually use.

Can you make it into:
- a morning plan
- an after-school plan
- a before-bed check

And maybe leave space for stuff that changes, like practice or a quiz? I like the checklist part, just want it tighter and easier to scan.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a tighter school-week version you can actually use.

## Simple School Week Plan

### Morning
- [ ] Wake up
- [ ] Get dressed
- [ ] Eat breakfast
- [ ] Check today’s schedule
- [ ] Pack anything needed for school
- [ ] Leave on time

### After School
- [ ] Look at homework and any updates
- [ ] Do the most urgent assignment first
- [ ] If practice / quiz / event: do that here
- [ ] Finish the next most important task
- [ ] Take a short break if needed
- [ ] Pack your bag for tomorrow

### Before Bed
- [ ] Check what got done today
- [ ] Write down what still needs to happen
- [ ] Put unfinished work in one place
- [ ] Set out clothes / supplies for tomorrow
- [ ] Go to bed on time

## Space for Changes
- [ ] Practice:
- [ ] Quiz:
- [ ] Test:
- [ ] Project:
- [ ] Other:

## What Still Needs to Happen
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

If you want, I can make this into a **Monday–Friday version** with the same format.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It’s tighter, and the blank spots help. I can actually use this now.
